title: 3 Piece Professional ASR Tactical Black Stainless Steel Throwing Knife Set
description:
Whether you’re a beginner or an expert at knife throwing, you know you need a quality set of knives to ensure a good throwing experience. Our three-piece set of throwing knives is made of military-grade stainless teel with fixed blades, so you don’t need to worry about your knife coming apart during use. In addition, they are easy to hold and have sharp points which are a necessary feature for any throwing knife. Our knives are of the highest quality and require no future maintenance. They are extremely lightweight and are made of high-quality black stainless steel. Stainless steel is corrosion and rust-free, making these knives very low maintenance

3 Piece Professional ASR Tactical Black Stainless Steel Throwing Knife Set

Whether you’re a beginner or an expert at knife throwing, you know you need a quality set of knives to ensure a good throwing experience. Our three-piece set of throwing knives is made of military-grade stainless teel with fixed blades, so you don’t need to worry about your knife coming apart during use. In addition, they are easy to hold and have sharp points which are a necessary feature for any throwing knife.

Key Features

  • HIGH QUALITY CONSTRUCTION – Our knives are made of military grade black stainless steel, which won’t rust or corrode. Their stainless steel construction will ensure that you have a safe and fun throwing experience whether you’re competing rain or shine.
  • GREAT FOR ALL LEVELS OF EXPERIENCE – These knives are designed to be used easily by beginners, intermediates or experts. The handles have an ergonomic design and measure just 5.5” in length, so you can easily travel with them. The knives are super-lightweight and don’t take much strength to throw accurately.
  • DURABLE SHEATH INCLUDED - The throwing knives come with a durable black nylon sheath featuring slots for the knives to keep them safe and secure when not in use. The sheath also has a convenient belt loop so you can attach it to your belt for easy access.
  • FIXED STYLE BLADE – Our throwing knives have fixed blades, so you’ll never have to worry about your knife coming apart during use or after a throw. The knives feature slots in the blade for aerodynamics to ensure that they soar accurately and precisely to your target.
  • SPECIFICATIONS – 3 Piece Knives, Material: Stainless Steel, Color: Black, Length: 5.5”, Weight of Set: .18lbs

Product Specifications

  • MPN: BLKTK3PC1
  • UPC: 810058480101
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 5.5 in

Our knives are of the highest quality and require no future maintenance. They are extremely lightweight and are made of high-quality black stainless steel. Stainless steel is corrosion and rust-free, making these knives very low maintenance. Just make sure to wipe them off when you’re done and you should have no problems!

These throwing knives come with a durable, nylon sheath with straps to keep your knives safe and secure while not in use. The sheath comes with a belt loop, so you can easily attach the sheath with your knives to your belt for quick access. The sheath itself is super lightweight and can easily fit inside of your pocket.

These knives are must-haves for collectors, enthusiasts, and throwing competitors!
